queries.question: What brands of agricultural machinery are available in each machinery store
queries.sql: SELECT Brands.brand_name  from Stores_Brands join Brands on Stores_Brands.brand_id = Brands.id join Agricultural_Machinery_Stores on Stores_Brands.store_id = Agricultural_Machinery_Stores.store_id   GROUP BY Stores_Brands.brand_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Stores_Brands.store_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agricultural_Machinery_Stores)

queries.question: What brands of agricultural machinery are available in each machinery store
queries.sql: select agricultural_machinery_stores.store_name , brands.brand_name from Stores_Brands join Brands on Stores_Brands.brand_id = Brands.id join Agricultural_Machinery_Stores on Stores_Brands.store_id = Agricultural_Machinery_Stores.store_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?store_name ?brand_name WHERE {
  ?stores_brands a :Stores_Brands .
  ?brands a :Brands .
  ?stores_brands p:hasBrands ?brands .
  ?agricultural_machinery_stores a :Agricultural_Machinery_Stores .
  ?stores_brands p:hasAgricultural_Machinery_Stores ?agricultural_machinery_stores .
  ?agricultural_machinery_stores p:name ?store_name .
  ?brands p:name ?brand_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What brands of agricultural machinery are available in each machinery store
